shared_properties: Popup frames use 160x80 px cells and stay legible against both the dark hall background and the cyan counter burst.
Typography panels keep centered numeric readouts with the copied package palette preserved in the file.
differences: This sheet provides eight frames for Perfect, Good, combo count, and damage-number popups with one-shot fade timing.

reference_images.label: Reflect Academy GDD
reference_images.purpose: Damage popup role, combo counter location, and one-second display duration grounding.

reference_images.label: Reflect Academy moodboard
reference_images.purpose: Glow readability and layered feedback contrast grounding.

bevy_constraints.bundle_strategy: Use TextureAtlasLayout with eight frames and despawn or hide the UI node after the non-looping popup animation completes.
bevy_constraints.asset_loading: Load ui/combo_damage_popup_sheet.png through AssetServer and instance the atlas near hit positions or combo anchors.
runtime_notes: Popup lifetime target is 1.0 second at 8 fps.
Use screen-space spawn offsets that start 24 px above the hit point.
Frame 0 is the strongest alpha and frame 7 is nearly transparent.

context.role: Floating popup atlas for damage numbers, Perfect or Good labels, and combo count bursts.
context.usage: Spawned after timing judgement and enemy hit confirmation, then faded out over one second.

deliverables.notes: Eight-frame popup atlas for combo and damage feedback.

acceptance_criteria: Sheet size is exactly 640x160 px with eight 160x80 frames arranged as 4 columns by 2 rows.
Visible feedback labels use only #00FFFF, #ADFF2F, #FFFACD, #E74C3C, and #1A1A2E.
Frame alpha descends monotonically from frame 0 through frame 7 for deterministic fade timing.
